channel.title: Hardware on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple Deals: AirPods Pro 3, MacBook Pro, AirTag, iPhone
item.description: Explore the latest Apple discounts across Amazon, Best Buy and 9to5Toys, covering AirPods Pro 3, AirTag 2, 14‑inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro and iPhone Air.

item.title: Apple iPad mini refresh: A12 Bionic, new design, impact
item.description: Apple is set to launch a refreshed iPad mini with the A12 Bionic chip, delivering a major design overhaul and new productivity for mobile users.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 Leak: Thinner, Brighter
item.description: Samsung is set to unveil the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, a slimmer, brighter device with IP69K protection, an 800 mAh battery, and Snapdragon Wear Elite.

item.title: Meta Glasses Debut: Affordable Smart Eyewear Redefined
item.description: Meta launches $299 Meta Glasses, offering Ray‑Ban‑style smart frames with a 12 MP camera, prescription lenses, and AI features, shaking the wearable market.

item.title: NVIDIA's 113°F Liquid‑Cooled Data Centers Cut Costs
item.description: NVIDIA’s Rubin generation uses a 113 °F closed‑loop liquid‑cooling system that eliminates chillers, cuts energy use by up to 4 % per degree, saves millions annually, and reduces noise and water consumption dramatically.

item.title: Why 2026 F1 Batteries Struggle at Spa‑Francorchamps
item.description: An in‑depth look at how the 2026 F1 hybrid battery’s limited energy output clashes with Spa‑Francorchamps’ speed, and what it means for the sport.

item.title: Archer and Anduril Unveil New Electric Aircraft
item.description: Archer Aviation and Anduril partner to develop a new electric aircraft, merging urban air mobility with advanced defense technology systems.

item.title: Apple AirPods Max 2 at $449: Why the Price Drop Matters
item.description: Apple's AirPods Max 2 fall to $449 at Amazon and Best Buy, a $100 discount. We examine the H2 chip, USB‑C, and why this price cut matters for audio.

item.title: Ebike Safety Scandal: How Fake Certs Endanger Riders
item.description: Aipas Ebike's fake UL certification lawsuit exposes gaps in ebike safety standards, risking lives and eroding trust in micromobility.

item.title: Apple's 20th iPhone: Single Slab
item.description: Apple's 20th anniversary iPhone design vision, a single slab of glass, is nearing reality with Liquid Glass prep
